# Dependencies are declared in pyproject.toml — it is the single source of truth.
# This file is kept for tools that expect a requirements.txt (e.g. Streamlit Cloud).
#
#   pip install -r requirements.txt        -> runtime + dashboard (unpinned)
#   pip install -c requirements.lock -e .  -> the exact, reproducible versions
#   pip install -e ".[dev]"                -> development (tests, lint, notebooks)
#
# requirements.lock / requirements-dev.lock are generated by `make lock`.

-e .[dashboard]
